name: cetitan
flavor_texts: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.
Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.
text: Cetitan is the Terra Whale Pokémon. It is a ice-type Pokémon. Abilities: thick-fat, slush-rush, sheer-force (hidden). Base stats — HP: 170, Attack: 113, Defense: 65, Sp. Atk: 45, Sp. Def: 55, Speed: 73. Evolution line: cetoddle → cetitan. Lore: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin. Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.
